parameters.query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.project_type, p.location_city, p.location_province, p.property_type, p.property_area_m2, p.budget_target, c.name as client_name FROM projects p LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id WHERE p.id = $1::uuid
SELECT id, option_number, title, description, content FROM design_options WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND is_selected = true LIMIT 1
SELECT id, content, summary FROM briefings WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'approved' ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT content, model_recommended, temperature FROM agent_prompts WHERE agent_name = 'agent_regulatory' AND prompt_type = 'system' AND is_active = true LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO regulatory_tasks (project_id, task_type, title, description, entity, required_docs, estimated_timeline, estimated_cost, priority, draft_message, notes, status) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::jsonb, $7, $8, $9, $10, $11, 'detected') RETURNING id, task_type, priority, title

parameters.jsCode: const all = $input.all(); const pid = $('Receive Project').first().json.project_id; const tasks = all.map(i=>i.json); const tc = tasks.length; const cc = tasks.filter(t=>t.priority==='critico').length; return [{ json: { project_id: pid, tasks_count: tc, critical_count: cc, needs_external_contact: cc > 0, tasks_summary: tasks.map(t=>`[${t.priority}] ${t.title}`).join('\n') } }];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO approvals (project_id, approval_type, requested_by, context_data, status) VALUES ($1::uuid, 'external_contact', 'agent_regulatory', $2::jsonb, 'pending') RETURNING id

parameters.jsCode: const d = $input.first().json; const action = (d.query?.action || d.body?.action || 'reject').toLowerCase(); const data = $('Collect All Tasks').first().json; return [{ json: { action, is_approved: action === 'approve', project_id: data.project_id, tasks_count: data.tasks_count, critical_count: data.critical_count } }];

parameters.query: UPDATE regulatory_tasks SET status = 'confirmed' WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND priority = 'critico'
